Ravi Shastri Defends Gautam Gambhir After India’s South Africa Whitewash

Dec 8, 2025 • 8JJ Sports

Ravi Shastri Defends Gautam Gambhir After South Africa Whitewash

Former India coach Ravi Shastri has defended Gautam Gambhir following India’s 2-0 Test series defeat to South Africa, emphasizing that the responsibility lies with the entire team rather than one individual.

You can read the full original article on 8jj.com here:
👉 Ravi Shastri Defends Gautam Gambhir After India’s South Africa Whitewash
